docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $503.76 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEMMINGS, SANDRA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
